description: CRIT-710 cites slash-menu.dom.vitest.ts assertion names with single-quoted divider literals: "EC-EDIT-013: content === '---' exactly dispatches ChangeBlockType{newType:divider}" and "EC-EDIT-013: content === '--- ' (trailing space) does NOT dispatch ChangeBlockType". The actual test descriptions at slash-menu.dom.vitest.ts lines 110 and 121 use double-quoted `"---"` and `"--- "` instead: `'EC-EDIT-013: content === "---" exactly dispatches ChangeBlockType{newType:divider}'` and `'EC-EDIT-013: content === "--- " (trailing space) does NOT dispatch ChangeBlockType'`. Reviewers performing exact-string grep on the contract-cited names will report no match.

evidence.snippet: test('EC-EDIT-013: content === "---" exactly dispatches ChangeBlockType{newType:divider}', ...); test('EC-EDIT-013: content === "--- " (trailing space) does NOT dispatch ChangeBlockType', ...)
